channel.title: GitHub HCL Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of HCL in GitHub

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-eks
item.description: Terraform module to create Amazon Elastic Kubernetes (EKS) resources 🇺🇦

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-s3-bucket
item.description: Terraform module to create AWS S3 resources 🇺🇦

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-vpc
item.description: Terraform module to create AWS VPC resources 🇺🇦

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-iam
item.description: Terraform module to create AWS IAM resources 🇺🇦

item.title: GoogleCloudPlatform/cloud-foundation-fabric
item.description: End-to-end modular samples and landing zones toolkit for Terraform on GCP.

item.title: semgrep/semgrep-rules
item.description: Semgrep Community Edition rules, maintained by Semgrep and the community. Free to use under the Semgrep Rules License.

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-lambda
item.description: Terraform module, which takes care of a lot of AWS Lambda/serverless tasks (build dependencies, packages, updates, deployments) in countless combinations 🇺🇦

item.title: DataDog/serverless-sample-app
item.description: Explore Datadog's serverless observability features with this sample app.

item.title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-project-factory
item.description: Creates an opinionated Google Cloud project by using Shared VPC, IAM, and Google Cloud APIs

item.title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-cloud-storage
item.description: Creates one or more Cloud Storage buckets and assigns basic permissions on them to arbitrary users

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-ecs-container-definition
item.description: Terraform module to generate well-formed JSON documents (container definitions) that are passed to the aws_ecs_task_definition Terraform resource
